image:image.image:title: Team Fusion Nova — CodeBug Coding Hackathon 2026 Winner
image:image.image:caption: Team Fusion Nova winning first place at CodeBug Coding Hackathon 2026 with trophy and ₹15,000 prize — Rakesh Kumar Singh as team member

image:image.image:title: Rakesh Kumar Singh — Game x Innovate HackSprint 7.0 Runner-Up
image:image.image:caption: Runner-Up at Game x Innovate HackSprint 7.0 Grand Finale at MMCOE Pune — Team Fusion Nova winning ₹7,500 prize
